name: Claude 3.5 Sonnet
tagline: The breakout 2024 model that beat Claude 3 Opus while staying mid-tier priced.
metaDescription: The original Claude 3.5 Sonnet (Jun 2024) scored 59.4% GPQA, 88.7% MMLU and 92.0% HumanEval, beating Claude 3 Opus at $3/$15 with a 200K context window.
note: Original 3.5 Sonnet (claude-3-5-sonnet-20240620): outperformed Claude 3 Opus on most benchmarks at a fifth of the cost; introduced Artifacts.
overview: The original Claude 3.5 Sonnet was released on June 20, 2024, and was a breakout model: it outperformed the much larger Claude 3 Opus on most benchmarks while keeping mid-tier pricing and faster speed. It set new marks for the time on graduate-level reasoning (GPQA), undergraduate knowledge (MMLU), and coding (HumanEval).

On the well-documented benchmarks it scored 59.4% on GPQA Diamond, 88.7% on MMLU, 92.0% on HumanEval, and 68.3% on MMMU for vision. In Anthropic's internal agentic coding evaluation it solved 64% of problems, versus 38% for Claude 3 Opus. The launch also introduced Artifacts on claude.ai, a workspace for viewing and iterating on generated content.

Claude 3.5 Sonnet has a 200K token context window, up to 8,192 output tokens, and supports text and vision input, at $3 / $15 per million tokens. Its model ID is claude-3-5-sonnet-20240620; the snapshot was retired on October 28, 2025, with Sonnet 4.6 as the recommended successor.
strengths: Outperformed the larger Claude 3 Opus on most benchmarks at one-fifth the cost
Strong coding (92.0% HumanEval) and reasoning (59.4% GPQA Diamond)
Introduced Artifacts for interactive, iterative output on claude.ai
Roughly 2x the speed of Claude 3 Opus
useCases: Graduate- and undergraduate-level reasoning and knowledge work
Vision tasks: charts, diagrams and document understanding
Cost-efficient replacement for larger flagship models

pricing.note: One-fifth the cost of Claude 3 Opus at launch.

faq.q: Why was the original Claude 3.5 Sonnet significant?
faq.a: Released June 20, 2024, it beat the larger Claude 3 Opus on most benchmarks while keeping mid-tier price and faster speed, and it introduced Artifacts on claude.ai.
59.4% on GPQA Diamond, 88.7% on MMLU, 92.0% on HumanEval, and 68.3% on MMMU for vision.

faq.q: What is the model ID and context window?
faq.a: The model ID is claude-3-5-sonnet-20240620, with a 200K token context window and up to 8,192 output tokens.
No. The June 2024 snapshot was retired on October 28, 2025. Anthropic recommends Claude Sonnet 4.6.
